2606.24679.title: FlowPipe: LLM-Enhanced Conditional Generative Flow Networks for Data Preparation Pipeline Construction
2606.24679.paper_summary: Data preparation pipelines improve data quality in machine learning by transforming raw tables into learning-ready data through sequential cleaning and feature transformation operators. However, automatically constructing such pipelines is computationally difficult because operator sequences are combinatorial and end-to-end evaluation is expensive. Existing state-of-the-art (SOTA) Multi-DQN methods still face three key limitations: decoupled value estimators weaken long-horizon credit assignment, dataset context is only weakly injected into the policy, and exploration is inefficient in a sparse search space with many invalid states. To address these issues, we propose FlowPipe, a unified framework that formulates pipeline synthesis as conditional probabilistic flow generation over a directed acyclic graph. FlowPipe uses Conditional Generative Flow Networks (C-GFlowNets) with a Trajectory Balance objective to connect terminal validation rewards with early pipeline decisions. It further introduces Deep Semantic Modulation through Feature-wise Linear Modulation (FiLM), allowing LLM-derived logical priors to condition the policy's internal activations according to dataset semantics. In addition, FlowPipe incorporates failure awareness into the flow objective to avoid invalid states and concentrate search on high-potential regions. Experiments on two benchmark suites with 74 real-world datasets show that FlowPipe outperforms SOTA baselines, improving accuracy by 11.96% on average and achieving 12.5x faster training convergence. Source code is available at https://github.com/KunyuNi/FlowPipe.
2606.24679.paper_summary_zh: 資料準備管道透過連續的清理和特徵轉換運算子，將原始表格轉換為適合學習的數據，從而提高機器學習中的數據質量。<lb/>然而，自動構建這樣的管道在計算上是困難的，因為運算子序列是組合性的，且端到端評估的成本很高。<lb/>現有的最先進（SOTA）Multi-DQN 方法仍然面臨三個主要限制：解耦的價值估計器削弱了長期信用分配，數據集上下文僅被弱地注入到策略中，並且在許多無效狀態的稀疏搜索空間中探索效率低下。<lb/>為了解決這些問題，我們提出了 FlowPipe，一個統一框架，將管道合成公式化為在有向無循環圖上的條件概率流生成。<lb/>FlowPipe 使用帶有軌跡平衡目標的條件生成流網絡（C-GFlowNets），將終端驗證獎勵與早期管道決策連接起來。<lb/>它進一步通過特徵線性調制（FiLM）引入深度語義調制，使得基於 LLM 的邏輯先驗能根據數據集語義來調節策略的內部激活。<lb/>此外，FlowPipe 在流目標中納入了失敗意識，以避免無效狀態並集中搜索在高潛力區域。<lb/>在兩個基準套件上進行的實驗顯示，FlowPipe 在 74 個真實世界數據集上超越了 SOTA 基準，平均提高了 11.96% 的準確率，並實現了 12.5 倍更快的訓練收斂。<lb/>源代碼可在 https://github.com/KunyuNi/FlowPipe 獲得。
2606.24679.author: Kunyu Ni et.al.
2606.24679.authors: Kunyu Ni, Lei Cao, Jie He, Xiaotong Zhang, Jianfeng Jin, Junyu Dong, Yanwei Yu
